skillEvidence.evidence: built top-down and bottom-up market sizings for three retainer clients
presented findings to C-level clients monthly

background.resume: Three years as a strategy consultant at a mid-size firm. I scope market opportunities, build Excel models for sizing and unit economics, run competitive teardowns, and present recommendations to executives. I have not worked in investing: I don't know deal sourcing, diligence processes, cap tables beyond the basics, or how a growth fund evaluates SaaS metrics like net revenue retention in practice.

artifacts.text:
Role: Growth Equity Analyst
Company: Alder Ridge Capital
Sector: Growth equity / B2B software

Responsibilities:
- Source and screen growth-stage B2B software companies
- Build financial models and analyze SaaS metrics (ARR, NRR, CAC payback, burn)
- Support diligence: market maps, customer calls, competitive analysis
- Draft investment memos for partner review

Required:
- Strong analytical and modeling skills
- Clear written communication
- Curiosity about software business models

target.instructions: I care most about learning how funds actually evaluate SaaS metrics and write memos — not generic finance theory.

responsibilities: Source and screen growth-stage B2B software companies
Build financial models and analyze SaaS metrics (ARR, NRR, CAC payback, burn)
Support diligence: market maps, customer calls, competitive analysis
Draft investment memos for partner review
